primary_currency_system.displayRule: Store amounts internally as totalCopper/rewardTotalCopper/priceTotalCopper, display normalized highest-to-lowest, and hide zero denominations.

reward_earning_scale.difficulty: Very hard / care support / appointment / major chore
Dino task takeover / high-burden caregiver support

roleNotes: Chores are limited to trash to chute if energy allows, sink dishes when Squishy brings them, and laundry.
Wheelchair-first planning, seated/bed-level options, tiny steps, rest/recovery, oxygen-aware pacing, and effort/safety rewards are supported.
Nicotine vape fluid is included as a 21+ nicotine reward item.
Paid caregiver work blocks are included.
Duck collection and Jasper-specific favorites are included.

currencySystem.displayRule: Store amounts internally as totalCopper/rewardTotalCopper/priceTotalCopper, display normalized highest-to-lowest, and hide zero denominations.

currencyTiers.useFor: Opening, checking, choosing, gathering one item
Low-spoon self-care, tiny chore, tiny admin
One clear task chunk
Normal chore, care task, hobby work block
Gross, painful, sensory-heavy, executive-function-heavy
Hygiene, doctor, paperwork, phone call, trash out, full litter change
Squishy fully takes over a Dino-assigned high-burden task
Rest after hard task, stopping before crash, asking for help safely

globalPricingModifiers.addWhen: They tried even if they only did part of it
Hygiene/body-care task done with no shame, seated option, wipes, shower chair, or partial wash
Task happened during pain, MS fatigue, EDS instability, migraine, sensory overload, depression, anxiety, etc.
Body care, bathroom care, or clothing care done with consent/privacy/gentle wording
Squishy does a Dino-assigned task because Dino's body/access barriers are too high
Squishy takes over dishes, trash, laundry, fridge, mopping/sweeping, shower support, paperwork, phone call, doctor prep
They rest after effort, ask for help, repair after shutdown, or stop before a crash

gentleWording.use: Tiny wash counts. Your body still deserves care.
Would wipes, face wash, clean clothes, or sitting with supplies be enough today?
Partial completion paid out. Recovery counts too.

gentleWording.situation: A person takes over a high-burden task
gentleWording.use: You protected the home and the person you love. Hero reward added.
gentleWording.avoid: You had to do their job.

gentleWording.situation: A physical task is not accessible
gentleWording.use: This is an access barrier, not laziness.
Breaks are protected. Eating and decompression earn rewards.
This is a high-effort quest. Opening the portal counts.

merge_notes: Merged the uploaded currency-system.json with the uploaded currency_system_merged.json.
Only two JSON files were mounted/available in this chat, so the merge includes those two attached files.
Kept existing profile/task/store/game currency structures and added the standalone currency system rules, tiers, modifiers, and gentle wording.
